title: Review prompt pipeline safety
description: Read the assembly path and report whether input is scrubbed, PII redacted, instructions isolated, and assembly deterministic.
body: Use when asked whether a prompt pipeline is safe to ship. Actions: inspect the order of stages to confirm scrubbing and PII redaction run before assembly; verify untrusted input is confined to a labeled data region and cannot reach instruction position; check that assembly is deterministic and the template is versioned. Do not assume a working happy path means input is contained. Report and record the exact stage or line of each gap, classifying it as unscrubbed-input, unredacted-pii, input-in-instructions, or nondeterministic-assembly. This skill is read-only and must not change the template without runtime permission. Validation signals include a confirmed injection payload that fails to alter behavior and seeded PII absent from the outbound request. Risk boundary: raw input reaching instruction position or PII reaching the model is a blocking finding.
